# C2 kernel innovation screening exploration, June 2026

Generated by `mix run test/fixtures/rtk/generators/rover_c2_innovation_screening_2026_06.exs`.
Per-run JSON was emitted to `/tmp/c2-kernel-screening-2026-06-results.json`.

This is a single-sided exploration artifact. It ports per-epoch innovation screening into the Rust RTK filter kernel on branch `explore/c2-kernel-screen`.

## Setup

- Inputs match C1: phone RINEX from `/tmp/gsdc-work`, P222 CORS base observations, and BKG combined broadcast NAV.
- Detector segmentation is ON via the C1 detector-injected rover ambiguity ids.
- Runtime boundary: this report uses every built epoch in each arc.
- The measured path uses the Rust sequential filter (`filter_kernel: :rust`) with `innovation_screen_sigma` in 5.000, 8.000, 10.000, 15.000, 25.000 and `innovation_screen_min_rows: 8`.
- The screen rejects individual code/phase DD rows whose absolute normalized predicted residual is greater than k before the measurement update; if fewer than 8 rows survive, the epoch coasts on the prediction.

Median and p95 columns are reported only for arcs that solved every built epoch. Pooled values combine the completed arcs for that k.

## Verdict

Verdict: no. Best k=5.000 produced pooled median 10.312 m versus the 9.5 m one-epoch bar and demo5 pooled median 4.007 m.

## Convergence

Best k=5.000 time series are emitted in `best_k_error_series` in the JSON. Convergence below the one-epoch baseline after the transient: no. Final-100 pooled median/p95 is 10.331/33.985 m versus measured one-epoch pooled median 9.533 m; 0/4 arcs have final-100 median at or below their own one-epoch median.

| Arc | Epochs | One-epoch median m | First <= one-epoch | Below one-epoch % | Final-100 med/p95 m | Min/last m |
|---|---:|---:|---|---:|---:|---:|
| SJC1-08-04 | 1453 | 9.117 | 36 @ 2021-08-04T20:41:19.449 | 45.079% | 10.388/41.670 | 0.937/20.851 |
| SVL1-08-24 | 3136 | 9.516 | 4 @ 2021-08-24T20:33:04.437 | 46.269% | 11.402/31.841 | 0.422/6.230 |
| MTV1-12-15 | 1465 | 9.417 | 31 @ 2021-12-15T18:49:42.438 | 43.072% | 10.032/32.846 | 0.284/8.471 |
| MTV1-12-28 | 1610 | 9.965 | 29 @ 2021-12-28T20:17:54.438 | 45.155% | 10.212/23.343 | 0.613/8.976 |

## Costs

| k | Coasted epochs | Coasting % | Rejected row % | Rejected rows/epoch med/p95/max |
|---:|---:|---:|---:|---:|
| 5.000 | 214 | 2.792 | 51.150 | 12.000/14/26 |
| 8.000 | 79 | 1.031 | 50.313 | 11.000/13/24 |
| 10.000 | 68 | 0.887 | 50.196 | 11.000/13/24 |
| 15.000 | 56 | 0.731 | 50.101 | 11.000/13/24 |
| 25.000 | 54 | 0.705 | 50.040 | 11.000/13/23 |

Rows rejected per epoch is pooled across all solved epochs for each k. Coasting fraction is coasted epochs divided by solved epochs. Rejected row % is rejected rows divided by input screen rows.
